title: Bootstrap should extract useful project rules from existing bilingual docs
why_this_case_exists: This is the happy path for cold start on an existing site: good bilingual docs should become concise, useful memory.
setup: The repository already contains aligned source and target files.
Terminology is consistent across multiple documents.
The target docs are generally high quality.

input.observed_pattern: 知识库 is consistently translated as Wiki across multiple pages.

expected: memories/en.md captures concrete terminology and style preferences.
The rules clearly come from repeated patterns, not a single page.
should_not_happen: The memory stays too empty to be useful.
The tool copies page content into rules.
The output is generic filler instead of project-specific guidance.
